questions.question: Define what an algorithm is and provide an example of an algorithm.
questions.hint: Explain the difference between a recipe and an algorithm.

questions.question: What is the difference between a well-defined problem and an ill-defined problem, and provide an example of each?
questions.hint: Focus on how the two types of problems relate to the algorithmic approach.

questions.question: What is the first step in designing an algorithm, and explain why it is crucial?
questions.hint: Focus on the importance of understanding the problem and requirements.
